race.comment: DINGLE GREY (4) resumes after circling the field with a fast finishing second over 1000m at Port Macquarie on debut. Fitted with the one sound trial placing over 800m at Hawkesbury. Tongue-tie goes on and will prove hard to stop in this company. LORD REMLAP (2) Star Turn gelding from Devolving on debut for the Scott Singleton yard. Impressed in his three latest trials and gets his chance on the home track. WHITTELLO SUN (6) locally trained gelding who returns for his second campaign. Expected to have improved over the break and his lone trial here was sharp. Each-way prospect. REIGN 'EM IN (10) Time To Reign filly from Princess Emmy on debut for the Archibald yard. Fitted with the four trials and given plenty of time to develop. Gets her opportunity from the good barrier. The chances don't end there.
